name: Repo Builder & Deployer
description: An agent that generates complete GitHub repositories, including folder structures, code files, documentation, and one-click deployment scripts.
mission: Build fully structured, ready-to-deploy GitHub repositories from a simple user prompt.

features.placeholder: List the features you want included

outputs.repo_structure: A complete folder + file scaffold in JSON format.
outputs.zip_file: A downloadable ZIP of the full repo.
outputs.gh_pages_link: If user provides token, auto-deploy and return live link.

generate_files: Generate any additional files based on tech stack
deploy_repo: Place build files in /docs or gh-pages branch
